title: trigger doubleClick
text: trigger doubleClick Interactive trigger that handles processing when the user double-clicks a tree or list item in the Tree widget. Explain this code trigger doubleClick params string control : in ; TREE | LIST | KEYBOARD string item : in endparams ; <Your code here> end ; trigger doubleClick Copy Applies to: Form widgets: utree (Tree) Activation: Activated when the user double-clicks a tree or list item. Default behavior: None Behavior upon completion: None Parameters control —input control used by the user; one of: TREE —user clicked in the tree view LIST —user clicked in the list view KEYBOARD —user performed a keyboard action item —value of the double-clicked item Was this topic helpful?
